# Driving Fundamentals

The driver period is where your robot's capabilities meet human skill. Great drivers can maximize a good robot, while mediocre drivers waste a great one. This section teaches you how to drive effectively and safely.

::: {.callout-note}
## Learning Objectives

By the end of this section, you will be able to:

1. Execute precise movements with your robot
2. Communicate effectively with your driving partner
3. Handle game pieces under pressure
4. Make split-second decisions in competition
:::

---

# Section 5: Driving {.unnumbered}

## 5.1 The Two-Driver System

MRJL uses a two-driver system where each driver controls specific periods and mechanisms.

### Driver Responsibilities

```
Match Timeline with Driver Roles
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

          AUTONOMOUS (45 sec)        в”Ӯ    DRIVER CONTROL (75 sec)
          в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ      в”Ӯ    в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
                                     в”Ӯ
  0 sec в”Җв”Ө                           в”Ӯ
         в”Ӯ   NO HUMAN INPUT          в”Ӯ     NO HUMAN INPUT
         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
         в”Ӯ   Robot runs              в”Ӯ     Robot runs
         в”Ӯ   pre-programmed           в”Ӯ     driver-controlled
         в”Ӯ   routines                 в”Ӯ     routines
         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
 45 sec в”Җв”Өв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Өв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
         в”Ӯ           45 sec          в”Ӯ    Driver A (first 30s)
         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ    в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ    Driver B (last 30s)
         в”Ӯ                           в”Ӯ
120 sec в”Җв”Өв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Өв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
```

### Driver A вҖ” First 30 Seconds Specialist

**Primary focus**: Smooth transition from autonomous + early scoring

**Skills required**:

- Quick reaction time
- Precise pickup alignment
- Efficient path planning
- Clean handoff communication

**Typical responsibilities**:

1. Execute the post-autonomous pickup
2. Score the first game pieces
3. Set up Driver B for success
4. Communicate position and status

### Driver B вҖ” Endgame Specialist

**Primary focus**: High-value scoring + endgame activation

**Skills required**:

- Patience under pressure
- Precise endgame timing
- Awareness of remaining time
- Decision making for last pieces

**Typical responsibilities**:

1. Continue scoring after Driver A
2. Prioritize high-value targets
3. Position for endgame (last 30 seconds)
4. Execute endgame activation reliably

## 5.2 Driver Communication

Communication between drivers determines match success.

### Standard Callouts

| Callout | Meaning | Response |
|---------|---------|----------|
| **"Moving to pickup"** | Driver repositioning | Other driver waits/clears |
| **"Got one!"** | Game piece acquired | Continue to next action |
| **"Scoring!"** | About to score | Maintain position |
| **"Time check!"** | Asking for time remaining | Call out time |
| **"30 seconds"** | Endgame phase starting | Shift to endgame mode |
| **"Done"** | Action complete | Acknowledge and continue |

### Communication Protocol

```python
"""
Example driver communication structure.
This would be called via controller buttons or
physical signals in competition.
"""

# Voice/hand signals between drivers
DRIVER_COMMS = {
    # Pre-match
    "ready": "Drivers ready, awaiting start",
    "abort": "Emergency stop - issue detected",
    
    # During match
    "scanning": "Looking for target",
    "acquiring": "Moving to pick up",
    "acquired": "Game piece secured",
    "scoring": "Executing score",
    "scored": "Score confirmed",
    "blocked": "Path obstructed - pivoting",
    "reposition": "Moving to alternate position",
    
    # Handoff
    "handoff": "Releasing control to Driver B",
    "receiving": "Driver B ready",
    
    # Endgame
    "endgame": "30 seconds - switching modes",
    "approaching": "Moving to endgame zone",
    "activating": "Beginning endgame sequence",
    "complete": "Endgame achieved",
}
```

### Position Calls

Drivers must always know each other's position:

```
Robot Position Codes
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

A = Home zone / Starting area
B = Low goal zone
C = Mid goal zone
D = High goal zone
E = Pickup zone (nearest)
F = Pickup zone (far)
G = Endgame zone
X = Defensive position

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
```

## 5.3 Precision Driving Techniques

### The Three-Point Turn

Essential for navigating tight spaces:

```
Step 1          Step 2          Step 3
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ       в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ       в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
   в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ      в”Ӯ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ в—Ҹ в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–ә    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ      в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ в—Ҹ в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв–ә    в”Ӯ в—Ҹ в”Ӯ
   в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ      в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
   в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ               в”Ӯ
   в–ј               в–ј               в–ј
 Drive        Reverse        Drive forward
 forward      with turn      aligned
```

### Alignment Techniques

#### Using Physical Markers

```
Field Layout with Markers
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

     в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
     в”Ӯ                             в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ   A    в”Ҡ   B    в”Ҡ      в”Ӯ   A, B, C = Pickup zones
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ј      в”Ӯ   1, 2, 3 = Scoring zones
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ   1    в”Ҡ   2    в”Ҡ   3  в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ј      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ   C    в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ      в”Ӯ
     в”Ӯ    в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ        в”Ҡ      в”Ӯ
     в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҙв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

Alignment technique:
1. Find the intersection of two lines
2. Use controller deadband to stop
3. Verify alignment with sensor (if available)
```

#### Using Timer Approximations

When no visual markers exist:

```
Approximate Times (calibrate for YOUR robot)
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Action                     в”Ӯ Forward в”Ӯ Reverse
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Drive 12 inches            в”Ӯ  1.2s   в”Ӯ  1.4s
90В° turn (in place)        в”Ӯ  0.8s   в”Ӯ  0.8s
Align to pickup zone       в”Ӯ  0.5s   в”Ӯ  0.6s
Approach scoring zone      в”Ӯ  0.7s   в”Ӯ  0.8s

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
```

## 5.4 Game Piece Handling

### Pickup Techniques

#### Stationary Pickup

```
Approach Pattern for Stationary Pickup
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
         в”Ӯ PICKUP в”Ӯ
         в”Ӯ  ZONE  в”Ӯ
         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
              в–І
              в”Ӯ
              в”Ӯ  вҶҗ Slow approach
              в”Ӯ
    в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
         в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•Әв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
              в”Ӯ
              в”Ӯ  вҶҗ Gentle contact
              в”Ӯ
            [ROBOT]
              в”Ӯ
              в–ј
         в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
        в•ұ  GAME      в•І
       в”Ӯ   PIECE      в”Ӯ
        в•І             в•ұ
         в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

Key: Slow approach = accurate pickup
```

#### Moving Pickup (Advanced)

```
Intercept Pattern for Moving Pickup
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

     GAME PIECE (moving)
          в—Ҹ вҶ’
          в”Ӯ
          в”Ӯ Predict intersection point
          в”Ӯ
          в–ј
    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ    в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ    в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ  вҶҗ Robot waits at
    в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ в—Ҹ в”Ӯв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”јв”Җв”Җ  predicted point
    в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ    в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ    в”Ӯ
    в”Ӯ             в”Ӯ
    в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ

Key: Lead the target, don't chase it
```

### Scoring Precision

#### Height Transitions

```
Scoring Height Hierarchy
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

    Low Goal      Mid Goal      High Goal
    (easiest)     (medium)      (hardest)
    
       в”Ңв”Җв”җ           в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”җ         в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
       в”Ӯ в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ
       в”Ӯ в”Ӯ           в”Ӯ  в”Ӯ         в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ
       в””в”Җв”ҳ           в””в”Җв”Җв”ҳ         в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
        2pts           5pts         10pts

Strategy: 
- Secure low goals early (reliable)
- Build to mid goals
- Reserve high goals for when you have time
```

## 5.5 Endgame Driving

The last 30 seconds often determine match outcomes.

### Endgame Priority

| Priority | Action | Time Required | Points |
|----------|--------|---------------|--------|
| 1 | Endgame mechanism | 5-15 sec | 15-25 |
| 2 | High-value scoring | 8-10 sec | 10-15 |
| 3 | Low-value scoring | 3-5 sec | 5-10 |
| 4 | Defensive | Variable | Strategic |

### Endgame Timeline

```
Last 30 Seconds
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

30s  в”Ӯ  Begin endgame approach
     в”Ӯ  Driver B takes control
     в”Ӯ
25s  в”Ӯ  Reach endgame zone
     в”Ӯ  Position robot
     в”Ӯ
20s  в”Ӯ  Begin endgame mechanism
     в”Ӯ  If mechanism fails, switch to high-value score
     в”Ӯ
15s  в”Ӯ  Confirm endgame completion
     в”Ӯ  If not done, commit fully to backup plan
     в”Ӯ
10s  в”Ӯ  Lock in any remaining points
     в”Ӯ
 5s  в”Ӯ  Stop all motion
     в”Ӯ  Prepare for disable
     в”Ӯ
 0s  в”Ӯ  Match ends
     в”Ӯ  DON'T TOUCH CONTROLLER

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
```

### Endgame Checklist

Before endgame phase:

- [ ] Robot is functional
- [ ] Endgame mechanism is ready
- [ ] Path to endgame zone is clear
- [ ] Backup plan exists
- [ ] Both drivers know the plan

## 5.6 Driver Practice Routine

### Weekly Practice Structure

```
Driver Practice Session (90 minutes)
в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ

00:00 - 10:00  в”Ӯ Fundamentals
                в”Ӯ - Basic driving (forward, back, turn)
                в”Ӯ - Precision exercises
                в”Ӯ - Controller sensitivity tuning
                в”Ӯ
10:00 - 30:00  в”Ӯ Pickup Practice
                в”Ӯ - Stationary pieces (50 attempts)
                в”Ӯ - Timed pickup runs
                в”Ӯ
30:00 - 50:00  в”Ӯ Scoring Practice
                в”Ӯ - Each scoring height (20 attempts each)
                в”Ӯ - Speed optimization
                в”Ӯ
50:00 - 70:00  в”Ӯ Full Run Practice
                в”Ӯ - Complete driver period
                в”Ӯ - Multiple pieces
                в”Ӯ - Time trials
                в”Ӯ
70:00 - 90:00  в”Ӯ Communication Drills
                в”Ӯ - Two-driver coordination
                в”Ӯ - Handoff practice
                в”Ӯ - Problem recovery

в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җ
```

### Individual Skill Building

Each driver should practice individually:

#### Driver A Practice Focus

- Fast reaction time
- Precise first pickup
- Clean autonomous transition
- Quick scoring

#### Driver B Practice Focus

- Patience and timing
- High-value targeting
- Endgame precision
- Time awareness

### Progress Tracking

| Skill | Baseline | Week 1 | Week 2 | Week 3 | Target |
|-------|----------|--------|--------|--------|--------|
| Pickup time | 5.2s | 4.8s | 4.2s | 3.9s | < 3.5s |
| Score accuracy | 70% | 75% | 82% | 88% | > 90% |
| Run completion | 80% | 85% | 90% | 95% | 100% |
| Handoff time | 2.1s | 1.8s | 1.5s | 1.2s | < 1.0s |

::: {.callout-tip}
## The 100-Touch Rule

Practice each skill **100 times minimum** before considering it reliable. That's 100 pickups, 100 scores, 100 turns.

A skill practiced 100 times becomes muscle memory. A skill practiced 10 times is still thinking.
:::
